parameters.jsonBody:
={{ { "from": "Lead Intake Pipeline ", "to": ["juan.avila619@gmail.com"], "subject": "Lead Intake Pipeline failure - " + $json.workflow.name, "html": "

Workflow " + $json.workflow.name + " failed.

Failing node: " + ($json.execution && $json.execution.lastNodeExecuted ? $json.execution.lastNodeExecuted : "unknown") + "

Error: " + JSON.stringify($json.execution && $json.execution.error ? $json.execution.error.message : $json) + "

Execution: " + ($json.execution && $json.execution.url ? $json.execution.url : "see n8n executions list") + "

" } }}
